items.h: AEW Dynamite Beach Break ratings up with no sports competition

items.h: Report Claims AEW Title Match Was Originally Planned For Pay-Per-View
items.p: A recent AEW title match was moved from the upcoming AEW Redemption pay-per-view, and a new report has revealed who pushed for that idea.
